hero.title: Previous projects, presented as a browsable gallery.
hero.lead: Use this page to show recent work, visual direction, project categories, and short business context without forcing users into a heavy case-study flow.

intro.title: Interactive project gallery
intro.lead: Each project can be filtered by category and opened in a lightweight viewer. Replace filler content with real screenshots, metrics, deliverables, and project summaries.

cta.title: Want a deeper case study section later?
cta.body: This gallery can evolve into full case studies with before-and-after pages, metrics, process notes, and testimonial blocks.
